Title: Relates to coverage for treatments to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease and related dementias
Summary: Provides for coverage for treatments to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease and related dementias.
LawCode: Amd §§3216, 3221 & 4303, Ins L; amd §365-a, Soc Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the insurance law and the social services law, in relation to coverage for treatments to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease and related dementias
